prompt: Adjust the face lighting in the source image to match the brightness levels shown in the reference map,
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 (the woman's portrait) to adjust the lighting on her face. The new illumination on her face should precisely match the intensity and distribution of brightness as depicted on the man's face in image 2 (the lighting reference map). Specifically, areas that appear brightly lit (yellow/red) in image 2 should correspond to illuminated regions on the woman's face, while darker (blue) areas in image 2 should correspond to shadowed regions on her face.
